description: Execute repository hygiene by globally purging macOS .DS_Store artifacts and ensuring they are explicitly ignored in .gitignore.
scope: Delete all .DS_Store files tracked in the Git repository and physically present in the workspace. Append '.DS_Store' to the global .gitignore file to prevent future pollution.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO archiving of tasks, no modifications to docs or MCP server source code, and no workflow mutation beyond artifact generation.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify or delete any file not explicitly targeted (.DS_Store or .gitignore).
Executing without an approved M1 contract.
